entries.quote: Air India may wind back flight cuts if moderating fuel price trend continues
entries.signal: Cost management strategy; indicates willingness to expand capacity if fuel headwinds ease—relevant to Air India's competitive positioning on route offerings and pricing elasticity.
entries.belief: [Inferred · Medium] Wilson remains operationally focused on fleet optimization and fuel cost sensitivity despite his announced April resignation; signals Air India is managing capacity tactically rather than structurally.
